zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Lewknor於1439年出生在英國素可霍斯特德 凱恩斯時，他的父親Roger Lewknor30歲，母親Alianor Camoys32歲。他於1460年與Katharine Pelham在英國英格蘭素可特洛頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1484年7月20日在英國素可特洛頓享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Lewknor was born in 1439, in Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England, his father, Roger Lewknor, was 30 and his mother, Alianor Camoys, was 32. He married Katharine Pelham in 1460, in Trotton, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 20 July 1484, in Trotton, Sussex, England, at the age of 45.

Il a épousé Katharine Pelham en 1460, à Trotton, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1484, à Trotton, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

ko.Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 바코브 크로스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Lewknor(이)가 1439년 영국 수세스 호르스테드 케인스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Lewknor(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alianor Camoys(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 트로턴에서 Katharine Pelham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1484년 7월 20일 영국 수세스 트로턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Katharine Pelham em 1460, em Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, England: баркомб кросс, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Lewknor родился в 1439 г. в местности хаурстед кинесь, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Lewknor было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alianor Camoys, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Katharine Pelham в 1460 г. в местности троттон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 20 июля 1484 г. в местности троттон, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.
